scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n VITE,MAIN,ELECTRON -c cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run electron:watch-main" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist-electron/main.js && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist-electron/main.js"
scripts.electron:build-all: npm run build && npm run electron:build-main && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run electron:build-main && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run electron:build-main && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run electron:build-main && electron-builder --linux
